---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you thought about and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Implementation Notes (Optional)

If you have ideas about which files/modules would need to change, note them here.

## Additional Context

Any related issues, papers, or examples.
